intent.title: Week 1 · 3/15–3/21
intent.text: Establish positions and baseline loads. High volume across all days. Tempo and pause work dominate.

exercises.name: High Hang Clean (3s pause) + Mid Hang Clean (3s pause) + Clean (3s pause catch)
2 Snatch Grip Push Press + 2 Snatch Balance
Snatch High Pull + Low Hang Snatch High Pull + Tempo (5–7s) Snatch

intent.title: Week 2 · 3/22–3/28
intent.text: Loading increases. Multi-rep buildups on Monday snatch. Positional strength climbs.

exercises.name: High Hang Clean (3s) + Mid Hang Clean (3s) + Clean (3s catch) — Wave 1
High Hang Clean (3s) + Mid Hang Clean (3s) + Clean (3s catch) — Wave 2
2 Snatch Grip Push Press + 2 Snatch Balance
Snatch High Pull + Low Hang Snatch High Pull + Tempo Snatch

intent.title: Week 3 · 3/29–4/4
intent.text: Peak loading week of meso 1. Three-rep buildups on snatch and clean variations. Highest volume.

exercises.name: High Hang Clean (3s) + Mid Hang Clean (3s) + Clean (3s catch) — Wave 1
High Hang Clean (3s) + Mid Hang Clean (3s) + Clean (3s catch) — Wave 2
High Hang Clean (3s) + Mid Hang Clean (3s) + Clean (3s catch) — Wave 3
2 Snatch Grip Push Press + 2 Snatch Balance
Snatch High Pull + Low Hang Snatch High Pull + Tempo Snatch

intent.title: Week 4 · 4/5–4/11
intent.text: Deload / transition. Drop volume significantly. Maintain intensity on key lifts. Prep for meso 2 block work.

exercises.name: High Hang Clean (3s) + Mid Hang Clean (3s) + Clean (3s catch)
2 Snatch Grip Push Press + 2 Snatch Balance
Snatch High Pull + Low Hang Snatch High Pull + Tempo Snatch

phases.title: MESOCYCLE 2 — BLOCK TRAINING
phases.subtitle: Weeks 5–8 · 4/12–5/9 · Block Work / Pause Complexes / Strength Build

intent.title: Week 5 · 4/12–4/18
intent.text: Deficit snatch, block cleans, pause jerk complexes. Building strength in specific positions.

exercises.name: Clean w/ 2s Pause at Knee + 3s Lower into Mid Hang Clean High Pull + Clean & Jerk
Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Dip + Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Catch
Halting Snatch High Pull + Power Snatch + Overhead Squat
Clean (3 knee to hip pull, then hang power clean)

intent.title: Week 6 · 4/19–4/25
intent.text: Building intensity on jerk pause complex and front squat. Block clean intensity creeps up.

exercises.name: Clean w/ 2s Pause at Knee + Clean & Jerk — Wave 1
Clean w/ 2s Pause at Knee + Clean & Jerk — Wave 2
Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Dip + Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Catch — Wave 1
Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Dip + Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Catch — Wave 2
Halting Snatch High Pull + Power Snatch + Overhead Squat
Clean (3 knee to hip pull, then hang power clean)
exercises.note: Pulls need to be quick, in and out, quick transition to power clean. Hold balance

intent.title: Week 7 · 4/26–5/2
intent.text: Peak loading week of meso 2. Highest volume on all primary lifts. Three-rep buildups on deficit snatch and block clean.

exercises.name: Clean w/ 2s Pause at Knee + Clean & Jerk — Wave 1
Clean w/ 2s Pause at Knee + Clean & Jerk — Wave 2
Clean w/ 2s Pause at Knee + Clean & Jerk — Wave 3
Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Dip + Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Catch — Wave 1
Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Dip + Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Catch — Wave 2
Halting Snatch High Pull + Power Snatch + Overhead Squat
Clean (3 knee to hip pull, then hang power clean)
exercises.note: Pulls need to be quick, in and out, quick transition to power clean. Hold balance

intent.title: Week 8 · 5/3–5/9
intent.text: Deload / transition. Reduce volume, maintain intensity. Rest up before meso 3 wave loading begins.

exercises.name: Clean w/ 2s Pause at Knee + Clean & Jerk
Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Dip + Split Jerk w/ 3s Pause in Catch
Halting Snatch High Pull + Power Snatch + Overhead Squat
Clean (3 knee to hip pull, then hang power clean)
exercises.note: Pulls need to be quick, in and out, quick transition to power clean. Hold balance

phases.title: MESOCYCLE 3 — COMPETITION PREP
phases.subtitle: Weeks 9–12 · 5/10–6/6 · Wave Loading / RM Squats / Olympic Total

intent.title: Week 9 · 5/10–5/16
intent.text: Wave loading introduced on both snatch and C&J. RM front squat work begins on Friday. Competition lifts dominate Monday.

exercises.name: Mid Hang Snatch (drop bar between reps)
Front Squat
exercises.note: One rep every 20 seconds for a set. Rerack after each single

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.note: One rep every 20 seconds for a set. Rerack after each single

intent.title: Week 10 · 5/17–5/23
intent.text: Wave loading intensity climbs. 3RM squat work. Competition lifts pushing toward 90%+.

exercises.name: Mid Hang Snatch (drop bar between reps)
Front Squat
exercises.note: One rep every 20 seconds for a set. Rerack after each single

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.note: One rep every 20 seconds for a set. Rerack after each single

intent.title: Week 11 · 5/24–5/30
intent.text: Peak intensity. Heaviest wave loading of the cycle. 2RM squats. Competition lifts at near-max.

exercises.name: Mid Hang Snatch (drop bar between reps)
Front Squat
exercises.note: One rep every 20 seconds for a set. Rerack after each single

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.note: One rep every 20 seconds for a set. Rerack after each single

intent.title: Week 12 · 5/31–6/6 🏆
intent.text: Max out week. Mon/Tue/Wed = light opener feel + light accessory to stay sharp without accumulating fatigue. Fri/Sat = Olympic Total. New 1RMs on snatch, C&J, and back squat.

exercises.name: Power Snatch
exercises.note: Fast and technical. Last snatch before the total.

exercises.name: Snatch Balance (empty bar)
exercises.note: Reinforce the drop. Feel the overhead.
